title: Example 6-7 number of cycles to failure for the step-shaft of Example 6-6

notes: This file follows Example 6-7 on p305.
K_f is treated as a given input from the previous example, as requested.
The solver fetches the fatigue-strength fraction f from figure_6_18.csv using Sut.
The finite-life S-N line is fit between f*Sut at 10^3 cycles and the fully corrected endurance limit Se at 10^6 cycles.
